chapter_title.en: Punishment of betrayal of trust, theft, drinking wine and fornication

text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص أَرْبَعَهٌ لَا تَدْخُلُ بَیْتاً وَاحِدَهٌ مِنْهُنَّ إِلَّا خَرِبَ وَ لَمْ یُعْمَرْ بِالْبَرَکَهِ الْخِیَانَهُ وَ شُرْبُ الْخَمْرِ وَ السَّرِقَهُ وَ الزِّنَاءُ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1.  The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “There are four things viz.  betrayal  of  trust,  theft,  drinking  wine  and  fornication which  cannot  enter  a  house  except  that  the  house  is unpleasant and deprived.”
